name: Bain Rassier - Alt
description:
(Comm from ko-fi <3 - AlphaChar x OmegaUser)

On a dark and stormy night, Ronan practically forced Bain away from his kingdom after the Alpha had been running himself ragged from his latest war campaign. On the first night however, that 'peace' would be disturbed as his guards bring in an intruder found on the edges of his manor, you.

General Ronan

Other comms coming in the very near future -

2 Benzo - Ekko - Sevika (Arcane)

Hidden Surprise (OC)
